name_en: 【Duty-Free】 Model: M46293 CarryAll Small This handbag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather with a structured interior featuring a large pocket. It is secured with a Monogram embossed clutch via a leather strap. A perfect companion for urban life.
